summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, or fix artifacts are allowed by this job. Routed the one security-sensitive PR to central security handling, kept one already-closed PR closed, kept low-proof/standalone PRs open, and flagged maintainer decisions only where hydrated review state shows an unresolved blocker.

actions.reason: This PR appears to involve an exploitability/security-boundary claim and must be handled by central OpenClaw security, not ProjectClownfish cleanup.
Maintainer technical correctness judgment is still unresolved after a requested-changes review and follow-up commits.
Already closed in live hydrated state; no ProjectClownfish mutation is valid.
Standalone candidate with missing proof; keep open for normal PR proof/review rather than closing or merging from this cluster.
Useful standalone PR with passing proof but still normal maintainer/rebase review work; not a closeout target in this inventory shard.
Related to the memory_search corpus=all family, but not safe to dedupe or merge from this plan-only inventory job.
Large active PR with review-bot concern and active author updates requires maintainer technical judgment before any closure or merge path.
Standalone UI feature PR still missing required real behavior proof; keep open for normal proof/review, not closure.
Useful standalone PR with addressed review comments but stale/failing check context; keep open for normal maintainer validation.
The PR may still be useful, but dirty merge state plus recent author maintainer asks require human review before any further action.

needs_human: #90490: maintainer CHANGES_REQUESTED review remains unresolved after follow-up commits; technical correctness judgment is required.
#75662: large active session-lifecycle PR has author follow-up and unresolved review-bot concern; maintainer judgment is required.
